patches.summary: Hand-authored friendly 'quote' command (transfer + hourly) plus compare/fit/trip: geocode pickup/dropoff via OpenStreetMap Nominatim, POST /prices, render vehicle classes.
patches.reason: The /prices request body is deeply nested (pickup/dropoff objects, seconds-based hourly duration) and needs free geocoding to be usable; the generator's templated 'prices' command can't express this.
patches.validated_outcome: Live: JFK->Times Square transfer and Union Square SF 3h hourly both return real USD prices; fit picks the cheapest class that seats N.

patches.summary: Hand-authored SQLite quote ledger powering watch/log/search (every quote snapshot persisted; watch reports price delta vs last snapshot).
patches.reason: Quotes are POST-generated, not a GET resource, so the generator's sync-based store can't capture them; a dedicated ledger enables fare tracking over time.
patches.validated_outcome: watch records snapshots and reports deltas; log/search return rows; modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go).

patches.summary: Trim whitespace from each vehicle-model string in the flattened quote response (new trimModels helper applied where quotePackage is built).
patches.reason: The upstream /prices 'models' array carries leading spaces (e.g. ' BMW 5 Series'), which surfaced as ugly leading-space entries in quote/fit/compare/trip output.
patches.validated_outcome: Output review (Phase 4.85) format-bugs finding cleared; model lists render without leading spaces.

patches.summary: Authenticated account surface: auth login/status/logout (Auth0 refresh-token grant), me, bookings, wallet.
patches.reason: Blacklane's account data lives behind Auth0; the access token alone is rejected without the apollographql-client-name:web header set, and the durable model is a one-time refresh-token import that self-refreshes.
patches.validated_outcome: Live: auth login mints tokens via login.blacklane.com/oauth/token; me/bookings(timeState)/wallet return real account data.

patches.summary: book command: quote + assemble a booking, then hand payment off to the browser under --confirm. Never calls createBooking.
patches.reason: createBooking requires a Braintree-minted nonce + deviceData + 3-D Secure that can only be produced in a browser; headless booking is impossible by design, so payment stays human-driven in the browser.
patches.validated_outcome: book prints plan + real price; opens checkout only with --confirm; short-circuits under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY.

patches.summary: Resolve addresses via Blacklane's own public GraphQL (graphql.blacklane.com/public locationsAutocomplete+locationsGeocode), falling back to OpenStreetMap.
patches.reason: Blacklane-native resolution returns the placeId + airportIata that /prices uses for accurate fares, which OSM geocoding cannot provide.
patches.validated_outcome: quote 'JFK Airport' resolves to Blacklane's canonical place + placeId; prices match the web.

patches.summary: `auth login --chrome` reads Blacklane's Auth0 access token directly from Chrome's Local Storage LevelDB (snapshot-copy + goleveldb), so login is one command with no DevTools.
patches.reason: DevTools localStorage extraction is onerous; the published superhuman-pp-cli established the Chrome-leveldb read pattern. Imports the 24h access token only (not the rotating refresh token) to avoid poisoning the browser's Auth0 session.
patches.validated_outcome: auth login --chrome imports from the Default profile and `me` returns the account; non-invasive to the browser session. auth0CacheTokens falls back to a 24h relative lifetime when the cache entry carries neither expiresAt nor expires_in, so an imported token is never stamped already-expired.
